overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open-world game showing a cowboy character exploring a rugged wilderness area featuring a waterfall, rocky cliffs, and a river. The character walks along cliff edges, descends to a river, wades through shallow water, and continues along the bank beneath a rock overhang on an overcast day.

events.description: character begins walking left along the cliff edge away from the waterfall overlook

agents.ego_description: standing at cliff edge admiring the waterfall, then walking left along the rocky precipice overlooking the valley

entered.detail: medium-sized waterfall cascading down rocky cliff into a green pool below
layered rock formations forming the canyon walls
steep rock face with sparse vegetation
tall pine tree standing on the cliff edge
greenish water pool at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a scenic overlook of a waterfall cascading into a green pool within a rocky canyon. The character stands on a rocky precipice surrounded by layered cliff walls and evergreen trees, then begins walking left along the cliff edge as the camera follows in third-person perspective.

events.description: transition from rocky cliff edge to descending dirt path through grassy terrain
character approaches the river bank and slows slightly before entering the water

agents.ego_description: walking down a winding dirt path toward the river, navigating around rocks and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding down through the rocky terrain toward the water
grassy and rocky shoreline of the river
large boulders scattered along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the waterfall overlook behind and descends a dirt trail through moderately vegetated rocky terrain. The path winds down toward the river bank, with scattered boulders and pine trees visible along the route. The waterfall disappears from view as the character approaches the water's edge.

events.description: character steps into the river and begins wading through the shallow water
character exits the water onto the opposite riverbank

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river with water reaching knee height, creating ripples and splashes

entered.detail: clear greenish flowing water with visible current and ripples around the character's legs
smooth stones and boulders visible beneath the water's surface
grassy and rocky shoreline on the opposite side of the river

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the shallow, clear water flowing over smooth rocks. The current creates ripples around the character's legs as they cross toward the far bank. The surrounding landscape features grassy banks and rocky outcrops on both sides of the river.

events.description: character exits the water and transitions to walking on dry riverbank
character walks beneath a large rock overhang entering a partially covered area

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank and ascending a grassy slope toward a cliff overhang, then proceeding under the rock formation

entered.detail: large rocky ledge extending overhead creating a natural shelter
tall vertical rock wall with layered sedimentary formations
inclined terrain with tall grass and small shrubs

segments.scene_description: After exiting the river, the character walks along the bank and ascends a grassy slope toward a massive rock overhang. The environment transitions from open riverside to a semi-covered path beneath the cliff face, with the rock formation eventually extending overhead as the character walks beneath it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high mountain overlook down into a river valley and eventually beneath a massive rock formation. It begins on a rocky precipice overlooking a waterfall cascading into a green pool, with the camera trailing the character as they walk along the cliff edge. As the character leaves the overlook behind, the scene shifts to a winding dirt trail that descends through pine trees and boulders toward the water's edge. The camera then follows the character as they enter the river, wading through shallow, clear water and ripples before stepping onto the far grassy bank. Finally, the environment transitions from the open riverside to a semi-covered path as the character ascends a slope and walks beneath a towering rock overhang.
